docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS CLYDIA AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN BAY ROOFING COMPANY. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-15-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05 TRIAL OF OCT-18-1994 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
CERT MAIL TO GOLDEN BAY ROOFING CO RETURNED UNCLAIMED,
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN BAY ROOFING COMPANY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS CLYDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN BAY ROOFING COMPANY. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,020.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO GOLDEN BAY ROOFING CO. RETURNED FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $3,831.93 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN BAY ROOFING COMPANY.
